steps.title: Locate the reason for study
steps.content: The underlined sentence says astrobiologists search the Atacama Desert because it closely mirrors the extreme environment on Mars. The next sentences explain how organisms there may offer clues about Martian life.

steps.title: Match function to purpose
steps.content: Choice A says the sentence contrasts Atacama with Mars, but it compares them. Choice B focuses on why life cannot survive, and Choice D on study limitations; neither is the sentence's role. The sentence gives the reason for choosing the research site. The answer is C.
